legacy.expertiseDesc: Three decades of polymer industry leadership.

rnd.label: Innovation Hub
rnd.paragraph1Pre: FIXOBOARD is produced at our state-of-the-art manufacturing facility in
rnd.paragraph1Post: . Our operations integrate international quality standards with economical pricing to deliver a superior alternative to wood.
rnd.paragraph2: Our dedicated R&D wing continuously innovates to meet the evolving needs of the furniture and construction industries — with time-bound, uninterrupted delivery schedules.
rnd.floatingCardDesc: Developing next-generation composites for industrial needs.

green.label: Pro-Earth Alternative
green.intro: Illegal logging contributes to 14% of total global deforestation. Fixoboard PVC/WPC Ply is a sustainable substitute that delivers superior performance — without harvesting a single tree.
green.quote: Fixoboard is not just a brand — it is an industrial initiative to save our ecosystems.
green.paragraph1: Traditional plywood and wood panels place a heavy toll on our forests. Every Fixoboard product is designed to be a complete replacement — structurally and aesthetically.
green.paragraph2: Our composite boards are 100% recyclable and produce zero toxic emissions across their entire lifespan.
green.statDeforestationSub: of global ecological damage caused by illegal logging
green.statRecyclableSub: every board is a closed-loop recyclable composite
green.statEmissionsSub: no harmful chemicals released across the product lifespan

why.label: Value Proposition
why.subheading: A new generation eco-friendly ply engineered to be a lifetime investment for any project.
why.weatherDesc: Impervious to humid climates and direct water exposure.
why.fireDesc: Self-extinguishing build for high-risk industrial safety.
why.termiteDesc: Natural biological resistance against all types of pests.
why.leadFreeDesc: Safe for healthcare, food storage, and clinical environments.
why.mouldableDesc: Can be moulded and extruded into any shape or size.
why.recyclableDesc: Fully environment friendly with zero emissions.
why.lifetimeDesc: Highly durable construction that maintains value for decades.
why.hygienicDesc: Anti-bacterial surface easy to sanitize and maintain.
